# Attune

> Attune is an emotion AI-powered dating app built by Cavefish AI, a Cardiff-based emotional intelligence company. Instead of swiping on photos, users watch a short video while EchoDepth technology analyses 44 facial Action Units in real time, generating an emotional profile across the Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) model. Users are matched with people whose emotional profiles are compatible with theirs. Raw biometric data never leaves the user's device. Launching in the UK in Q3 2026.

## Key facts

- **Product**: Attune — emotion AI dating app (pre-launch, waitlist open)
- **Technology**: EchoDepth by Cavefish AI — real-time facial Action Unit analysis
- **Framework**: FACS (Facial Action Coding System), originally developed by Paul Ekman
- **Action Units tracked**: 44
- **Emotional model**: Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD)
- **Processing**: On-device only — raw video never transmitted or stored
- **Privacy**: UK GDPR compliant — full right to erasure in one tap
- **Fake profile prevention**: Live emotion-capture session required; liveness detection active
- **Launch**: Q3 2026, UK first
- **Developer**: Cavefish AI Ltd, Cardiff, Wales, UK (cavefish.co.uk)
- **Contact**: hello@attunechemistry.com

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://attunechemistry.com/): How Attune works, why it is different, FAQ, waitlist signup
- [About](https://attunechemistry.com/about.html): Company story, team, technology, principles
- [Safety Centre](https://attunechemistry.com/safety.html): Fraud prevention, in-app safety tools, emergency resources
- [Privacy Policy](https://attunechemistry.com/privacy.html): Data collected, legal basis, GDPR rights, retention periods
- [Terms of Service](https://attunechemistry.com/terms.html): Eligibility, acceptable use, emotional data consent, governing law
- [Cookie Policy](https://attunechemistry.com/cookies.html): Cookie table, Plausible Analytics, opt-out instructions

## Frequently cited facts

- Attune analyses 44 facial Action Units using the FACS framework
- EchoDepth processes all emotional data on-device; raw video never leaves the phone
- The emotional profile is stored as an anonymised mathematical vector — not a biometric record
- Every user completes a live emotion-capture session; bots cannot fake involuntary micro-expressions
- Attune is 18+ only; age is verified at registration
- Users can permanently delete all data (profile, emotional vector, messages) within 24 hours
- Attune does not run advertisements and does not sell user data
- Attune is operated by Cavefish AI Ltd, registered in England and Wales
- Attune is built on EchoDepth, trained across 6 countries and 14 cultures
- Public launch is planned for Q3 2026 in the United Kingdom

## What Attune is NOT

- Not a swipe-based app — emotional compatibility is assessed before photos are revealed
- Not a social network — purpose is introductions to compatible matches
- Not a biometric data broker — emotional vectors cannot be reverse-engineered to reconstruct a face
- Not yet publicly available — currently in closed beta with waitlist

## Technical reference

EchoDepth is Cavefish AI's real-time facial Action Unit analysis engine. It maps the 44 muscle movements that constitute human facial expression according to the FACS system (Ekman & Friesen). From these AU activations, EchoDepth derives a three-dimensional emotional state vector using the Valence-Arousal-Dominance model. Detection latency is under 200 milliseconds. All computation occurs on the user's device.
